checks.finding: All named technology decisions carry inline rationale: Node>=20 (frontend-spec.md Technology Stack: 'MCP SDK 要件充足・fs/path の安定 API・利用者環境の下限'), TypeScript 5.x ('型安全なパーサー実装'), esbuild ('単一ファイルバンドル（dist コミット方式）'), js-yaml ('review ticket パース', alternative 'yaml' rejected: 'js-yaml は依存ゼロで軽量'), and ADR-0002/0003. No unjustified 'we will use X' statement found.

design.md ## Open Questions contains one entry, OQ-001 (Codex への MCP 登録手段), with Owner: ai-implementer (a role), Blocks Implementation: no, and Resolution Path stated. All three required fields present.

investigation.md is absent, and design.md ## Assumptions has 3 entries, but each cites its own grounding basis inline (existing CI config; installer's pre-existing Claude CLI requirement; stated MIT license classification + package-lock.json), satisfying ASSUMPTIONS-VALID condition 2 (reasonable technical default with cited basis) independent of investigation.md.

design.md has a ## Constraint Compliance section (Primary/TYPE-D path applies). requirements.md states a size-limit constraint: '巨大ファイル / バイナリ混入 → サイズ上限（2 MiB、design.md Data Plan と同値）超過を too-large 構造化エラーで返す' (Edge Cases) and AC-017. This constraint has no corresponding row in design.md's ## Constraint Compliance table (rows only cover read-only/REQ-001, shell-equivalence/REQ-005, allowlist-denylist/REQ-006, root-fixation/REQ-007, dist-distribution/REQ-008, bash-compat/REQ-009, 3-OS-CI/REQ-010). The 2 MiB limit is stated elsewhere in Data Plan and the error envelope, but is absent from the dedicated Constraint Compliance section, which the Primary rule requires for every requirements.md constraint.

No performance requirements found in requirements.md. The p95<=500ms and startup<=1s targets appear only in infra-spec.md Service Level Objectives as a layer-spec refinement, not a requirements.md-sourced requirement. Per check definition, PASS applies when requirements.md contains no such requirements.

design.md ## Deployment / CI Plan names the deployment target (INSTALL_ROOT/mcp/sdd-forge-mcp/ via installer; local stdio child process), a flag-based rollout mechanism (--skip-mcp / --mcp <list>), concrete CI changes (mcp-tests 3-OS matrix, dist-parity step, installer test additions); migration execution order is not applicable (Data Plan declares no schema changes).
design.md ## Data Plan states 'Existing Data Affected: なし（読み取りのみ）' and 'Migration Strategy: 不要'. Per check definition, PASS applies when Data Plan states no data changes.

The server has zero runtime external integrations (stdio-only, no network per security-spec.md). The only cross-tool touchpoints are installer-time local CLI/config operations (claude mcp add, Codex config.toml), whose failure behavior is addressed (OQ-001 for Codex; Node-absent installer skip). No integration meets the check's runtime cross-service target profile.

design.md Technical Summary '13 tools + 5 resources' matches REQ-002 (8) + REQ-003 (5) + REQ-004 (5 resources) exactly. No component/data-model/endpoint appears without a corresponding requirement; every Goals/User Stories item has a design element. No scope creep or under-scoping found.

High-risk surfaces (path-guard allowlist/denylist/traversal; read-only integrity guarantee) each name a concrete validation path: TEST-003, TEST-004, TEST-011, cross-referenced in Cross-Layer Dependencies and security-spec.md Security Tests. No PII/payment/fullstack-journey surface applies to this api-only read-only feature.
